About the club

Built for people who
refuse to plateau

A Square Fitness Club sits on three floors in the heart of Fatehgarh — a training ground designed the way a premium gym should feel anywhere in the world, without leaving home. Matte black walls, gold-lit rigs, and a floor plan built around one idea: every rep here should count.

Our Mission

Make elite-level training and coaching accessible in Fatehgarh, without compromise on quality.

Our Vision

To be the region's benchmark for strength training — where results and environment both feel premium.

Why Choose Us

Imported-grade machines, certified trainers, and programs built around your body, not a template.

For Everyone

Every membership at A Square is open to both men and women, all fitness levels welcome.

What you train with

Everything a serious floor needs

Premium Equipment

Imported-grade strength machines and free weights, maintained to a standard, not left to wear.

Certified Trainers

Every coach on the floor is certified and hands-on — not just present, but paying attention.

Personalised Programs

No copy-paste routines. Your program is built around your body, goal, and schedule.

Nutrition Guidance

Simple, sustainable eating plans that fit an Indian kitchen — not a fad diet.

Strength Training

A full rig setup for powerlifting, bodybuilding, and general strength work.

Cardio Zone

Treadmills, ellipticals, and rowers on our open-air upper floor with a skyline view.

Functional Training

Kettlebells, battle ropes, and functional rigs for real-world strength and mobility.

Locker Facility

Secure, clean locker rooms so you can walk in and train without friction.

Motivational Environment

Gold-lit floors, good music, and a community that pushes you on the hard days.

Training styles

Services built around your goal

Weight Training

Structured hypertrophy and strength programming across free weights and machines.

Cardio

Treadmills, ellipticals, and rowers for endurance and fat-loss focused sessions.

Strength Training

Barbell-first programming for raw strength — squat, bench, deadlift, and beyond.

Functional Training

Kettlebells, sleds, and battle ropes for athletic, real-world conditioning.

Personal Training

One-on-one coaching with a dedicated trainer who tracks every session.

Nutrition Guidance

Meal plans built around your goals, your schedule, and your kitchen.

Member stories

Real people, real results

“Been training here for over a year. The equipment is genuinely gym-quality and the trainers actually correct your form instead of just counting reps.”

Karan Mehta
Member since 2023

“I joined with my sister on the Duo Pass. The energy on the floor is unmatched and the results came faster than I expected.”

Sneha Gupta
Duo Pass member

“Best gym in Fatehgarh, full stop. The open-air cardio deck upstairs is my favourite part of the whole club.”

Vikas Chauhan
Member since 2022
Questions

Frequently asked

We offer Solo and Duo passes across 1, 3, 6, and 12-month durations. All plans are open to both men and women and include full equipment access.

A Square Fitness Club is open daily from 5:00 AM to 10:00 PM, including weekends.

Yes — our certified trainers offer one-on-one personal training with a program built around your specific goal.

Premium strength and cardio equipment, a functional training zone, an open-air cardio deck, and secure locker rooms.

We accept cash, UPI, and all major cards at the front desk. Ask our team about instalment options for annual plans.
